description: Recto (original use): Isḥāq b. Avraham appoints Furāt b. Yosef as a power-of-attorney against neighbors who had taken possession of the house he had inherited in the village of Manda in the Galilee. Dated ca. 1030 and written by Efrayim b. Shemarya (fl. 1007–1055 CE). (Information from from Bareket, p. 147, and from Goitein's attached notes.)
tags: Yefet b. David b. Shekhanya, power of attorney
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
